title: justicia petiolaris subsp. petiolaris
intro: Justicia petiolaris subsp. petiolaris, also known as dwarf false buttonbush, is a flowering plant species in the family Acanthaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been traditionally used in medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Justicia petiolaris subsp. petiolaris include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
